    eIDAS extension for OpenSAML 5.x - 3.3.2

    Packages
    Package
    Description
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas
    OpenSAML eIDAS extension library.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.common
    Common definitions for the OpenSAML eIDAS extension package.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.config
    Configuration classes for the OpenSAML 4.X eIDAS extension library.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext
    Interfaces and classes representing eIDAS extension elements.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.attributes
    eIDAS attribute definitions.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.attributes.address
    Support types for the eIDAS CurrentAddressStructuredType.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.attributes.address.impl
    Implementation classes for the supporting types of the eIDAS CurrentAddressStructuredType.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.attributes.impl
    Implementation classes for eIDAS SAML attributes.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.impl
    Implementation classes for eIDAS SAML extensions.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata
    Classes and interfaces for supporting the eIDAS MetadataServiceList.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata.impl
    Implementation classes, builders, marshallers and unmarshallers for the eIDAS metadata service list types.
    se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.xmlsec
    Security extensions for eIDAS.
